programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: George and Harold decide to do an extra credit project on dinosaurs to help their chances of getting summer camp-worthy grades. When Melvin brings in a dinosaur frozen in ice, the boys try to get rid of it. But the ice thaws and they meet Diddlysaurus, a prankster raptor who's huge fans of the boys. He offers to help them with their project if he can pull pranks with them, but when the pranks go too far, the boys and Captain Underpants have to deal with the dino.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 29
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Dinotrux S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Meet Ty Rux and his buddy Revvit as they join forces with the giant Dinotrux team that are half dinosaur, half construction truck and full-on fun!

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy S3 - EP 66
programme.desc: Lucky and Bebe spend the weekend pretending to be besties when their fathers come for a family visit and reveal that they're old friends.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: After being made fun of for sitting in chocolate pudding, George and Harold go into hiding only to come back to find that everybody has forgotten who they are

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Tired of mean Mr. Krupp, the boys go back in time to prevent him from becoming a bully, but discover that their plan has backfired when they return to the present

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: In order to retrieve Mr. Krupp’s locked up rule book, George and Harold use an invention that ends up turning against them

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: Po and Blade rush to warn the Emperor about the weasels, but he has Po arrested and Colin captures Blade, revealing that she was never a knight. Thrown in a cell, Po reunites with Rukhmini and Mr. Ping, and he copes with the truth about Blade as they break out. Po fights Klaus and Veruca but is outmatched. Blade defeats Colin and hurries to help Po but is too late.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Blade tells Po the truth about Alfie. The group chases after Klaus and Veruca in an epic snowy mountain chase, culminating in Po saving Blade’s life as the weasels take off with the gauntlet and the whip. Rukhmini reveals that she actually has the real whip in her staff, and she knows where to go to get the next one: India.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: The team arrives in India where an old friend of Rukhmini can supposedly give them a pendant that will lead to the next Tianshang weapon. But when they arrive, they find that Rukhmini’s hometown has changed a lot in the thirty years she’s been gone, and her old friend Diya might not be willing to help them.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 35
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 36
programme.desc: When the Gabby Cats get stuck in the leaves of an overgrown cupcake tree, it's up to Gabby, Pandy and cupcake-expert Cakey to work together to shrink the overgrown cupcake tree branch by branch--and to save CatRat from where he's stuck at the top! For our COTD segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 37
programme.desc: Kitty Fairy's garden is transformed into a fairy-riffic fairground for The Fairy Festival! At the festival, Gabby and Pandy meet an excitable little fairy named Luli-loo who joins them as they explore the festival. Luli-loo may not be the best at all the fair games, but she's never afraid to give it a go and learn from her mistakes!

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 41
programme.desc: Boss tries to rename the local soccer team to "The Babies", but after Danny gets involved in the popularity race with his name, "The Hot Dogs", the town becomes divided. Boss creates a crack team of Baby Corp employees to game plan solutions to the worst outcomes.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 42
programme.desc: Boss arranges a sleepover with Quiet Psycho Baby to get access to her father the Mayor's day planner, hoping to plant his own pro-baby agenda. However, staying up all night has the unexpected consequence of delusional over-tiredness! Tim sneaks into an art film and decides he has to be a grown-up now, so Mom and Dad try to "kid" him up again.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 43
programme.desc: Boss' reign as CEO is threatened by a charming, multiple-dimpled Outside Consultant Baby (OCB) hired by the Board of Directors. Boss, furious that OCB will ruin Baby Corp with his poorly thought out ideas, tries to distract him while Staci adds the finishing touches to a project that will make OCB unnecessary, The 24 Hour Diaper.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 42
programme.desc: Inspired by their favorite TV show, George and Harold - along with Principal Krupp - blast off to outer space, where an angry toilet awaits.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 43
programme.desc: After George and Harold learn the truth about their mission, Dupe Licitous enlists the entire crew in a quest to repair a rogue satellite.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 44
programme.desc: Everybody on the spaceship has been cryogenically frozen for three months - everyone, that is, except Krupp, who's wide awake and happily in charge.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 14
programme.desc: Now in Rafaela’s custody, the crew works together to break Echo out to retrieve the hauler. Echo makes it into the jungle and must battle a mind-controlled Ms. Nowhere using everything she’s learned about spying and survival from the very woman who's out to get her. Meanwhile, Rafaela enlists Frostee to help her develop a non-exploding version of the mind control formula before her plan goes into motion at the favela race.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: Echo and Ms. Nowhere bust Cisco, Frostee, and Gary out of their cell. But Rafaela has already mind controlled Tony and Layla and taken them to drive for her in the favela race, allowing her to release her mind control formula on the crowd!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: Our team battles Rafaela’s mind-controlled crowd. They soon discover that Rafaela’s true plan is to steal the spy plane. Tony deduces that Rafaela isn’t doing all of this for the money - she’s doing it for family.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 36
programme.desc: A fierce game of plot potato takes an unexpected twist when Melvin unleashes one of his most fiendish -- and carb-loaded -- creations yet.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 28
programme.desc: Stuck in separate camps, Harold and George unleash a hyperintelligent talking possum to scare the pants off of Krupp. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: After helping George and Harold make a comic featuring the heroine Plungerina, Erica asserts that Plungerina could be better that Captain Underpants. To prove her wrong, the boys decide to actually create the villain in the comic and then have Captain Underpants save the day. Unfortunately, Krupp - and therefore Captain Underpants - is away at a principals' convention.There's no one to save them...until a real life Plungerina saves tthe day! But who is really Plungerina?

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: As a prank, George and Harold use Melvin's new animal hybrid invention to create a creature that's a cross between a butt and a fly. But some of the monster butt-erflies want to eat everything in sight- including the students hiding out in the school gym!

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: George and Harold decide to do an extra credit project on dinosaurs to help their chances of getting summer camp-worthy grades. When Melvin brings in a dinosaur frozen in ice, the boys try to get rid of it. But the ice thaws and they meet Diddlysaurus, a prankster raptor who's huge fans of the boys. He offers to help them with their project if he can pull pranks with them, but when the pranks go too far, the boys and Captain Underpants have to deal with the dino.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: When Jindiao arrives to the Village, he invites the kids to participate in an exhibition match, but has alternative motives

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: When Aja and Krel learn a secret, military base may house an alien spacecraft, they enlist Stuart to help them infilitrate it. Meanwhile, General Morando unviels his latest weapon - Omen, a deadly, cyborg assassin.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: During her last days on Earth, Aja decides to tell Steve the truth: she's an alien. But her plans are complicated when the Zerons abduct Aja, Steve and Krel. Meanwhile, Vex struggles with an impossible choice: saving the Royal teens or the Royal Cores.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: With the Mothership ready for liftoff, Aja and Krel celebrate their last day on Earth at Battle of the Bands. But their world is rocked when Zadra arrives with a startling revelation about Vex - and a new enemy threatens their departure.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S3 - EP 62
programme.desc: After being ambushed by aggressive Slitherwing dragons on a new island, the Riders think Stormfly has been poisoned and race to get an antidote

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S3 - EP 63
programme.desc: Tuff fakes his own death to make room for Throk, but when Ruff tries to train the Changewing that she thinks ate Tuff, a flock of angry Changewings come for the dragon

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S3 - EP 64
programme.desc: On a search for Dagur's dad, Hiccup and Dagur encounter vicious Grim Gnashers, and Tuff's search for a missing Chicken leads him to discover she has a second family

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: Chet becomes obsessed with tracking down a litterbug who is messing up the clean streets of Turbotown. // The FAST crew must compete against each other as they run a dangerous obstacle course race to save a damselfly princess who is being held captive.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: Chet accidentally trades all of the town's tomatoes to the devious Ace Gecko and the FAST crew has to outsmart the lizard in order to get them back. // Skidmark has been secretly keeping a clamsquatch as a pet and it's up to the crew to protect the creature from a nefarious secret organization.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: Archibald takes an unexpected trip to outer space. When a yummy recipe goes missing, Archibald P.I. sets out to crack the case.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 45
programme.desc: The Ninjas are giving a special display of acrobatics and climbing to Noddy, the Pirates and the Knights. It looks amazing! Noddy goes back to Toy Green to tell Big Ears all about it and narrowly misses being run over by the runaway Pirates Galleon. Someone has taken their sticky anchor and without it they've no way of stopping the ship! Noddy needs to investigate before there's an accident! He follows all the clues which leads him to the Knights.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 46
programme.desc: When the Builders' traffic cones disappear from their building site, there is chaos all over Brickabuild. Noddy decides to investigate right away and find out who's taken them. Did the Naughticorns take them for their obstacle course? Or was it Farmer Tom who used them to keep his animals under control. Noddy carefully follows the clues and at last discovers it was the Pirates who took them to use as markers for Stripes' Pirate Galleon Driving Test.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 47
programme.desc: When Fuse's collection of Special Things goes missing, Noddy vows to track them down. He soon works out that Bling was in Fuse's Workshop but it turns out that she just went in to add a Special Thing to Fuse's collection. More clues lead Noddy to Smartysaurus. She admits she went into Fuse's Workshop but tripped on an oil can and fled when she saw all the mess she'd made. As for the Special Things, they'd already gone when she got there.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 48
programme.desc: The Captain is upset because all of his shiny gold coins have been painted grey. It's a disaster as far as the pirates are concerned! Noddy decides to investigate. He realises that the grey coins are actually the gold coin covered with paint. They're not the only things that have turned grey too - Deltoid's shiny gold medal has been painted grey too.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 45
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Puff Adder didn't shed his skin. All the animals were afraid of Puff Adder because he was very difficult to see and he had a nasty bite. Puff Adder decides that if no beast wants to be his friend then he doesn't want to have any friends. He slithers far, far away to the desert where he bumps into Camel and learns that every animal needs a friend. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 46
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Eagle didn't rule the skies. She was a humble bird who kept herself to self. But then one day things start going wrong for the birds - some beast steals Hen's eggs, Hummingbird loses her hum and Tickbird goes missing! Eagle quietly saves the day and Lion rewards her with half his Kingdom. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 1
programme.desc: Ted Glenn's Cornish cousin Ned is sending him a steam engine as an alternative means to power his workshop. Pat and Jess set off to Cornwall to collect this very large special delivery in the SDS Plane whilst Ted sets about giving away all of his old inventions to the people of Greendale in order to clear out enough space for the engine. Pat and Jess meet the eccentric Ned Glenn at his workshop and wrestle with the crate containing the heavy engine to get it aboard the plane.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 2
programme.desc: Pat has to deliver some pumpkins to Greendale School for the annual Halloween Pumpkin Party. But when he picks them up from Ted's workshop, Jess starts playing with a giant pumpkin and it rolls into the river and floats away. Pat follows it along the river and tries to fish it out with Alf's rod but the pumpkin is too heavy and the line breaks. As the party gets under way in Greendale, the giant pumpkin floats out to sea and Pat and Jess board the SDS Orca and head out into Pencaster Bay.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 37
programme.desc: Big Chris has got a new gadget to monitor the cars. He puts it to the test, what could possibly go wrong?!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 38
programme.desc: Big Chris is furious when Marsha tidies up his workshop - how's he supposed to work in these conditions? Luckily Flash saves helps out by messing it up again!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 39
programme.desc: Conrod is having an engine tune up at Silver Hatch. He boasts that his spoilers make him faster than all the other cars… who then want to be just as fast as their V8 hero…

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 40
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor is fed up with Roary and Maxi constantly bickering about who is the fastest car at Silver Hatch. He decrees that the pair will have a race, and whoever wins, is the fastest - no more arguing!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Smartysaurus is going to launch into space in her all-new super space rocket. But as her friends all watch on the Daredale Big Screen, the picture suddenly goes dead! Noddy investigates to find out what happened to Smartysaurus.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: Smartysaurus is trying out her new jet pack, but she hasn't read the instructions before taking off and cannot control it properly. Noddy investigates to help her control it before things get too dangerous.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 7
programme.desc: All is set for the Toy Green Picnic until Noddy finds some of the trees turned upside down! Was it the Ninjas climbing on them? Or the Pirates wanting an upside-down tree for Pirate Bay? Noddy launches an investigation to find out who's behind all this.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 8
programme.desc: The Knights have found a mysterious Golden Thing. But the Pirates insist it's their Golden Thing. Noddy tries to settle the argument by investigating: Who is the owner of the Golden Thing? He soon finds more and more Golden Things have been hidden all over Toyland.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 39
programme.desc: It’s Cat-O-Ween in the dollhouse, and all the Gabby Cats are in the holiday spirit. Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 40
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Burple gets spooked by the legend of a ghost called the Phantom Fang. But when he senses the story is real, he can't get his friends to believe him.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: After Magnus accuses Cutter of setting fires near the village that could hurt the sheep, the Riders have to put them out and find the real culprit.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: When accident-prone Rodney gets hired to babysit a mischievous toddler, TZG secretly watches over their safety. / When there’s a power outage in Harmony Harbor, TZG secretly helps the townsfolk beat the blackout.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: When Phoebe’s Gratitude Day card flies away before she can give it to Marcus, the Dews try to help her recreate it - perfectly. But they learn that you don't have to be perfect to show your gratitude for someone. / When Athena finds herself a little short-handed at the Fairhaven Summer Fair, her cousin, Reed, comes to help; only to give Athena more problems to fix.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Smartysaurus is going to launch into space in her all-new super space rocket. But as her friends all watch on the Daredale Big Screen, the picture suddenly goes dead! Noddy investigates to find out what happened to Smartysaurus.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: Smartysaurus is trying out her new jet pack, but she hasn't read the instructions before taking off and cannot control it properly. Noddy investigates to help her control it before things get too dangerous.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 7
programme.desc: All is set for the Toy Green Picnic until Noddy finds some of the trees turned upside down! Was it the Ninjas climbing on them? Or the Pirates wanting an upside-down tree for Pirate Bay? Noddy launches an investigation to find out who's behind all this.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 8
programme.desc: The Knights have found a mysterious Golden Thing. But the Pirates insist it's their Golden Thing. Noddy tries to settle the argument by investigating: Who is the owner of the Golden Thing? He soon finds more and more Golden Things have been hidden all over Toyland.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 31
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! Carlita, decked out like a safari truck, takes Gabby and Pandy on an adventure through the dollhouse as they follow clues to find the mysterious Felis Catus and discover all kinds of other dollhouse wildlife along the way! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 32
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: When one of Rikki’s plants won't sing, Pixie and Juniper both tell their varying recollections of why the plant is suddenly silent. / Kelp, Scallop, and Cruz have always thought that starfish did nothing but laze about; but as they go about their day, the starfish goes through his own routine, completely unbeknownst to everyone else.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: Leroy must learn to let go when his caterpillar friend turns into a butterfly. / When Pixie loses her spark, Kelp and Juniper look for the plant they think will cure her. Meanwhile Pixie wonders whether she can be cured at all!

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: It’s Pawston’s annual Take Your Kid to Work Day, and it’s Tag’s year to spend the day at the Doorbell Store with Paw. \ Sam Whippet challenges the Not Yet Cadets to complete an obstacle course in the woods.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Scooch is bummed out because he’s missing his favorite holiday back in his old farm town, so Tag wants to cheer him up by rounding up some chickens and bringing Clucky Day to Pawston. \ When there’s a schedule mix-up and the Pawston Get Sox players think they have a day off, it’s up to Tag and Scooch to round up all five players in time for the fetch game, so that they don’t have to forfeit.

programme.title: Dinotrux S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: When Revvit and his Reptool friends venture out of their ravine, the Dinotrux band together to save them from a flock of savage Scrapadactyls.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy S3 - EP 67
programme.desc: As a new term begins, Maricela and her horse, Mystery, arrive at the academy to join Lucky, Pru and Abigail for the school year.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 47
programme.desc: When Eep and the others try to intervene with Thunk and Blurg's first date, they decide to run away so they can live happily ever after; Snoot and Ugga race each other to get to the Doomsday Skunkguin but are forced to put their differences aside once the weirder animals come out to hunt them down

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 48
programme.desc: When Eep is kicked out of Thunk's new imaginary role-playing adventure game she decides to play her own, real version of the game; Fed up with Squawk's mean teaching style, Eep has Grug fire him and replace him with Rad, the quintessential young, cool teacher

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: When Ruffnut is captured by Dragon Hunters, it's up to Astrid and Tuffnut to defend Dragon's Edge from the invading Dragon Hunter army Dragon's Edge from the invading Dragon Hunter army

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: Unaware of the war on Dragon's Edge, Hiccup, Snotlout and Johann discover an island full of dragons that have been wounded by the Dragon Hunters

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: As the Dragon Knights prepare to battle for the weapons and control of Tikal, Mastodon attempts to teach Po how to access storm powers to use in the fight. Blade comes face to face with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: The team heads into a final confrontation for the weapons that not only threatens Tikal, but their lives. And Po must share hero duties with Mastodon.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 38
programme.desc: The Gabby Cats put their own spin on the classic fairytales "Rapunzel," "The Princess and the Pea," and "Little Red Riding Hood." For the Cat of the Day Segment, CatRat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 39
programme.desc: It’s Cat-O-Ween in the dollhouse, and all the Gabby Cats are in the holiday spirit. Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 40
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 44
programme.desc: Boss and family go on Spring Break to visit his grandparents in the big city of Chicago. Boss uses the trip to test his business mettle, by getting in a promotion war at a real big adult company. And when a department store refuses to let Gigi and Tim return an item, they wind up unionizing the entire sales force.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 45
programme.desc: Mom and Dad are panicking after Gigi noticed Boss isn't growing, so Boss "puts himself under", taking a special formula that will turn him int a regular baby long enough to pass a Doctor's checkup. However, with Boss gone, all the villains from this season see it as the perfect time to strike Baby Corp, leaving Staci to hold the floodgates.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 46
programme.desc: Looking to trim costs, Boss unknowingly fires Boom Baby, a super-undercover Baby Corp worker who displays to parents how unsafe things are by pratfalling on them and crying for attention. Convinced he's the victim of a conspiracy, Boom leaves a wake of parent worry in his path, forcing Boss to stop him.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 45
programme.desc: The crew meets their blue-hued doppelgängers when they crash-land on an alien planet where kids call all the shots.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 46
programme.desc: Melvin isn't exactly their friend ... but it's not like George and Harold can just let him be held captive by diabolical Biglyans, right? Right?!?

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 47
programme.desc: Oh, the indignity: George and Harold are forced to perform spa treatments on gigantic Biglyans. Also, Dr. Fitzgibbons reveals a shocking secret.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: Cleve Kelso breaks Rafaela Moreno and a dangerous, cybernetic prisoner named Matsuo Mori from a high-security ice prison. Back in LA, Tony and the crew experience a major shake-up when Echo gets accepted to Ms. Nowhere’s spy training but Tony is rejected. While Tony is grappling with his identity crisis, Echo struggles to survive spy school, and Ms. Nowhere and Gary disappear in a massive North African storm during their hunt for Cleve. Echo must lead the Toretto crew and finish Ms.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: The team travels to Nihaya, or "The Dead End," in their pursuit of Nowhere’s mission. Unfortunately they run into some of Layla’s spurned former criminal partner Sandocal, who steals the kids’ cars for revenge on Layla. With Frostee, Cisco, and Echo held captive, Tony and Layla drive for Sandocal in a dune buggy race to win back their crew’s freedom.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: The kids are low on supplies in the Sahara and stumble on a town with a well that has mysteriously run dry. The crew decides to investigate and discovers a Cleve Kelso-controlled water facility that’s stealing water from the village. They manage to blow up the facility, but it alerts Rafaela and Matsuo to their whereabouts.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 31

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated "Late Night with Seth Meyers," hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series’ signature "A Closer Look" segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated "Late Night with Seth Meyers," hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series’ signature "A Closer Look" segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions’ is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: "American Greed" goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: Managing Asia
programme.desc: CNBC’s longest running feature show. For over 20 years Christine Tan has been talking to people who are shaping, governing and leading the Asia-Pacific region in this multi-award award winning show.

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains’ is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.desc: It’s one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. programme.title: The World Today

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and "accepted wisdom" to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, the Agenda quite simply sets the agenda. You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. Local correspondents and local production teams provide authoritative and in-depth stories from across the region. Africa Live is an objective and comprehensive look at every facet of African life.

programme.title: Talk Africa
programme.desc: Talk Africa is a weekly discussion show that brings the most influential voices in Africa to the world. Broadcast from CGTN’s production center in the Kenyan capital, Nairobi, Talk Africa looks at Africa and the world from an African perspective.

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues. We examine the changes and growth in China's domestic leagues, as the country undergoes an incredible economic transformation.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. It presents 360 degree profiles of industry movers and shakers, tech mavericks and policymakers, and drills down on the stories behind their success, to give you clarity on what’s happening in every facet of business.

programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. Local correspondents and local production teams provide authoritative and in-depth stories from across the region. Africa Live is an objective and comprehensive look at every facet of African life.

programme.title: Asia Today
programme.desc: Asia Today highlights the latest news and social developments across Asia. Correspondents in over a dozen countries report on the region’s top stories as they happen. Analysts bring Asian perspective to topical and developing issues. Asia Today also emphasizes the diverse cultures and lifestyles of the world’s most populous continent.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. programme.title: China 24
programme.desc: China 24 is a prime time news program featuring in-depth reports and analysis of the stories in the headlines in China. Produced by CGTN’s studios in Beijing and Washington D.C., the show takes a compelling and comprehensive look at China. It explores the country’s business, politics, technology, culture, entertainment and more. China 24 tackles head-on the issues that matter most to the nation and its people, with topical reports highlighting challenges facing this fast-changing country.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. With two decades of experience as a news anchor and overseas correspondent, LIU Xin has an engaging and personal style. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.title: i&AI (R)
programme.desc: A fun program that explores generative AI through animation and live action. In the animated segments, a 10‑year‑old boy and girl team up with a robot to ask simple questions like "How can AI talk?" and "Does it make mistakes?" In the explanation corner, familiar examples-such as assembling a hamburger or a parrot learning human words-clarify how AI works and highlight not only its convenience but also its risks.

programme.title: no art, no life (R)
programme.desc: Self-taught artists are gaining respect globally. In Japan, such artists are making career-defining works, but few art fans or curators know them.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Week 3 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: NHK Special "A Looming Nightmare: Mt. Fuji Eruption" Part 2 (R)
programme.desc: A documentary based on timely subjects famous for its dignity and in-depth reporting.

programme.title: Blue & Yellow 10min (R)
programme.desc: As different colors, blue and yellow can make green by getting together, similarly different lives can coexist by helping each other. This is a program to develop the mind of living together.

programme.title: Today's Cooking Special Edition: Tassin Shima's Small Journey
programme.desc: In the autumn of 2025, 150 years after apples were first planted in Aomori, Shima visits Hirosaki for the first time during the apple harvest season. Meeting women apple growers and a craftsman who makes traditional bamboo harvesting baskets, she explores the people and traditions behind Aomori’s apple culture. Be sure to enjoy Shima’s apple‑filled sweets and everyday dishes, made with her signature love for apples.

programme.title: Premium Drama "The Opposition" Ep. 1（New） (R)
programme.desc: A rumor emerges that a prestigious medical university has been lowering female applicants’ exam scores. Reporter Hiba Kikuno (Matsumoto Wakana) begins investigating and zeroes in on board member Kanbayashi Harumi (Suzuki Honami), who deftly deflects every inquiry. As Hiba pushes closer to the truth, the two women - each shaped by injustices in a male‑dominated society - find their convictions in direct conflict.

programme.title: The Visualization Entertainment: Go! Kaneo-kun
programme.desc: The show is MC-ed by comedian Ariyoshi Hiroiki, who hosts an NHK program on a regular basis for the first time. The mascot character "Kaneo-kun" (voice of Nobu, of comedy duo Chidori), who loves money, visits various places, including popular visiting locations, and looks into different phenomena to learn how money plays a role. The undertaking help unravel unexpected trends in society. The program, which can be enjoyed by every member of the family, offers much food for thought.

programme.title: Nosy's Inspiring Atelier

programme.title: Historical Drama "BROTHERS IN ARMS" Ep. 15
programme.desc: To strike back at the Asakura and Azai clans, Oda Nobunaga calls on Ashikaga Yoshiaki and Tokugawa Ieyasu (Matsushita Kouhei) for military support. Yet their response is slow, as they secretly hope for Nobunaga’s downfall. Meanwhile, Koichiro and Tokichiro try to buy time to help Ichi escape, but her heart remains with Azai Nagamasa, and their plan fails. As Nobunaga advances into northern Omi, the armies of Asakura and Azai face him across the Anegawa River, and the moment of battle arrives.

programme.title: Premium Drama "The Opposition" Ep. 2
programme.desc: A rumor emerges that a prestigious medical university has been lowering female applicants’ exam scores. Reporter Hiba Kikuno (Matsumoto Wakana) begins investigating and zeroes in on board member Kanbayashi Harumi (Suzuki Honami), who deftly deflects every inquiry. As Hiba pushes closer to the truth, the two women - each shaped by injustices in a male‑dominated society - find their convictions in direct conflict.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 16
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Drama Serial "Massan" Encore Ep. 79
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.desc: A weekly programme covering notable news stories from Hong Kong and around the world. It focuses on social issues that matter most to Hong Kong residents and invites people from various sectors to discuss and analyse the underlying causes and developments.

programme.title: Cooking Beauties

programme.title: Retirement Reimagined
programme.desc: Retirement Reimagined explores how the people of Hong Kong can prepare for a secure and meaningful retirement. Through real‑life stories, expert interviews and financial planning tips, the show examines how much money is really needed to retire.

programme.title: Music Money Monster
programme.desc: Music Money Monster challenges ordinary people and celebrities to battle through live singing stages judged solely by a real‑time AI pitch and beat analyzer, turning flawless intonation into instant cash rewards for players and viewers!

programme.desc: Big City Shop introduces viewers to the latest products on fashion, skin care, make-up, health care, baby care and much more!

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2788
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.title: Time Raiders & What's On Today - EP 4
programme.desc: Antique dealer Wu Xie uncovers a silk manuscript hiding a map. With his uncle Wu Sanxing's crew, they raid ancient tombs and battle creatures, only for his uncle to vanish after finding a snake-scale relic.

programme.title: Try It? Really?
programme.desc: Host Kong Mei-yee travels to different places in Guangdong Province, where she teams up with two partners at each stop to test various dishes as customers to see if they're good value for money, and exploring whether various attractions are worth visiting.

programme.title: Food Mister
programme.desc: Have you wondered what fictional dishes in the literature would taste like? We invite a star chef to find inspiration from TV series, video games, cartoons and literary classics, discovering some of the special delicacies mentioned in them, and recreating these seemingly unreal dishes.

programme.title: Solo Road Trip
programme.desc: Tired of checklist-style travel? Internet celebrity Liang Jiaming (Mingzai) stays true to himself, embarking on spontaneous, no-planned road trips and sharing his travel experiences from a first-person perspective.

programme.title: Big Boys Club
programme.desc: Each episode of Big Boys Club invites singers, artistes as well as people from different walks of life as guests onto the show, participating in relaxed interviews and discussing current trends.

programme.title: Romance of A Twin Flower - EP 20
programme.desc: Ji Man loses her memory after a fall and awakens as the hated wife of Minister Ning Yuxuan, but turns her fate around through wit, helping him win imperial favour. Together they defeat powerful enemies and overcome political plots, finally finding love amid hardship.

programme.title: News At 18:30 & Global View & What's On Today
programme.desc: Bringing you the news from Hong Kong, the mainland and around the world every evening at 6:30pm.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2789
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. programme.title: Holistic Way+Ninjiom - Themis - EP 16
programme.desc: High Court judge Yan Huizhi investigates a case involving a 14-year-old boy linked to a child's death. Discovering that he had repeatedly offended without punishment due to his age, she demotes herself to the juvenile court to help reform troubled youths.

programme.title: EXTRA

programme.title: News Roundup

programme.title: Global View

programme.title: The Silver Chamber Of Sorrows - EP 18
programme.desc: "Sheung’s Silver Chamber", the largest jewel company in Foshan, Guangdong Province China, is facing serious financial difficulties. In order to obtain a loan from SHUM’s family, SHEUNG HANG (Chun Pui), owner of the Chamber, together with his primary wife, CHOI SIU-DIP (Sit Ka Yin), plot to arrange marriage between SHEUNG WAN (Ng Wai Kwok), HANG’s younger brother, and SHUM WING-TUNG (Young Yuen Yee), daughter of SHUM’s family.

programme.title: Colourful Life - EP 1
programme.desc: The CHENG family has been running a business in the dyeing industry for several generations. Master CHENG and his wife died early. His mistress, SHUI KWUN DING FUNG (TSUI SUJK YEE), has since been running the business and keeps the family in shape._x000D__x000D_The eldest son, CHI SHING (LAW MONG), is a simple and straightforward person. He has a good and helpful wife, CHOW MONA (SO YUK WAH, LOUISA). The second son, CHI POK (YUEN SIU CHEUNG, LOUIS), is a short-tempered man.

programme.title: The Ultimate Addiction - EP 22
programme.desc: Financial elite, CHEUK YUK (Bosco Wong), never hesitates to use any dirty tricks to gain a profit, so he has been under close surveillance by the Commercial Crime Bureau (CCB). Being obsessed with money and power, CHEUK YUK constantly neglects his family members and friends. Because of him, his wife and mentor pass away respectively, yet he shows no remorse at all. On the contrary, his craving for money and power continuously increases.

programme.title: The Ultimate Addiction - EP 23
programme.desc: Financial elite, CHEUK YUK (Bosco Wong), never hesitates to use any dirty tricks to gain a profit, so he has been under close surveillance by the Commercial Crime Bureau (CCB). Being obsessed with money and power, CHEUK YUK constantly neglects his family members and friends. Because of him, his wife and mentor pass away respectively, yet he shows no remorse at all. On the contrary, his craving for money and power continuously increases.

programme.title: The Conquest - EP 15
programme.desc: During the Spring and Autumn Period, ancient China was divided into small kingdoms ruled by various powerful regional warlords. This was a time of massive upheaval when a myriad of dramatic stories took place. The more than 20-year-long fight among the man of virtue FAN LAI (CHEN KUN), the persistent and dauntless AU TSIN (LAU CHUNG YAN, DAMIAN), the legendary hero FU CHAI (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) and the mesmerizing beauty SAI SZE (KWOK, SONIJA) is a true classic that will long be remembered.

programme.title: The Ultimate Addiction - EP 25
programme.desc: Bookshop staff FONG HOK MAN (Chun Pui) always believes that "knowledge is power". He tries hard to encourage his older son FONG SUM MING (Lai Yiu Cheung) and his younger son FONG SUM CHING (Suen Eric) to study more. Unfortunately, MING is not good at studying at all and he quits after secondary school. On the other hand, CHING is a very smart boy and MING works hard overseas to support CHING’s further studies on computer sciences in America.

programme.title: When a Man Loves a Woman - EP 11
programme.desc: Man (Kwok Tsun On), Fai (Ng Chun Yu), Wah (Esther Kwan) and Shan (Fennie Yuen) grew up together and were very good friends. Man, Fai and Shan even shared an apartment. Fai was a playboy. He liked fooling around without any commitment. Man, on the other hand, was very loyal to his girlfriend - Wah._x000D__x000D_Man and Fai treated Shan as their brothers since she acted like a tom-boy. However, Shan was in love with Fai.

programme.title: Can't Buy Me Love - EP 21
programme.desc: Reluctant to marry into the Tibetan royal family, the willful Princess CHIU YEUNG (Charmaine Sheh) has to find herself a husband as soon as possible. Owner of a gold store TING LOI-HEI (Kwan Kuk Ying) recommends her second and third sons, KAM DOR-LUK (Moses Chan) and KAM DOR-SHAU (Wong Ho Yin) to the Princess, hoping that the royal marriage would bring them out of financial crisis and save their family business somehow.

programme.title: Speakers Of Law - EP 6
programme.desc: Kam Bing-shun (Kenneth Ma) is a top law student. However, due to a miscarriage of justice, he decides to follow the path to becoming a Legal Executive. By means of his diplomatic and tactful approach, Bing-shun gradually builds his own brand, Adviser Kam. The law firm where Adviser Kam works abruptly faces the prospect of closing down. He uses networking to defuse the situation. He is also invited by lawyers Tin Yau-ka (Lam Ha Mei) and Yu Kwok-tung (Stephen Wong) to join their team.

programme.title: Succession War - EP 12
programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. Following QIANLONG’s death, EMPEROR JIAQING manages to convince HESHEN’s son FENGSHEN-YINDE (Matthew Ho) and confidant FUCHANG’AN (Joel Chan) to turn their coat, seeking to sweepingly eliminate HESHEN and his cronies. But, HESHEN comes prepared.

programme.title: Revolving Doors of Vengeance - EP 2
programme.desc: Hotel tycoon WONG YUK TING’s family starts a legacy dispute immediately after his death. The third son KAI KIT (NG CHEUK HAI, RON) leaves home. His mother is soon forced to leave by his half brothers. Furthermore, KIT finds out that TING has transferred his hotel shares to a stranger KO FUNG, MARTIN (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE). _x000D__x000D_ FUNG comes for revenge. He swears to get hold of the whole hotel.

programme.title: Revolving Doors of Vengeance - EP 3
programme.desc: Hotel tycoon WONG YUK TING’s family starts a legacy dispute immediately after his death. The third son KAI KIT (NG CHEUK HAI, RON) leaves home. His mother is soon forced to leave by his half brothers. Furthermore, KIT finds out that TING has transferred his hotel shares to a stranger KO FUNG, MARTIN (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE). _x000D__x000D_ FUNG comes for revenge. He swears to get hold of the whole hotel.

programme.title: King Of Beggars
programme.desc: So was born a nobleman but is relegated to a beggar after being caught cheating. He becomes the chief of the Beggar's gang when he saves the gang's elder. One day, So foils an assassination attempt on the Emperor and is allowed to reinstate his status but he declines. He is then rewarded with an imperial beggar bowl and lives happily ever after.

programme.title: Mid-night Two
programme.desc: Yi Cheng and his friends venture into a haunted mountain that hides an ancient corpse and an eternal ghostly flame. No one who enters the mountain ever returns and at 2:30 AM, Yi Cheng's friends vanish one by one. While searching for them in the eerie forest, Yi Cheng enters a realm of infinite reincarnation, facing a series of terrifying events...

programme.title: Final Justice (1988)
programme.desc: Chang is a brilliant police inspector, but his maverick ways have put him at odds with both his superiors and peers. When he encounters Wai, a streetwise car thief who accidentally becomes the key to tracking down a gang of armed bank robbers, the two form an uneasy alliance to bring the criminals to justice.

programme.title: Let's Have a Baby
programme.desc: De Sheng and Wan Jun have been married for years, but are unable to conceive. Wan Jun decides to undergo artificial insemination in the States and finally gets pregnant. She meets her cousin from the States who stays temporarily in their house with them, and De Sheng begins to suspect that they are having an affair...

programme.title: Fierce Cop
programme.desc: To save his son who has been kidnapped by human traffickers, police officer Zhang relentlessly hunts them down and accidentally finds himself implicated in a major child abduction case. In the process, he teams up with a mysterious lady to crack the international crime syndicate and rescue his son.

programme.title: The Sorcerer & The White Snake
programme.desc: In this action fantasy movie based on the Chinese legend of the White Snake, a young herbalist falls in love with a thousand-year-old white snake disguised as a woman. When the white snake's true identity is revealed, a sorcerer goes to battle believing that in doing so, he is restoring balance and order between man and the supernatural.

programme.title: Kowloon Walled City
programme.desc: Neng was a street fighter in Northeast China but decides to start a new life in Hong Kong's Kowloon Walled City. Unfortunately, he is implicated in the fights and conspiracies among the triad forces. When his good friend is hunted down by the triad, Neng must team up with the residents of Kowloon Walled City to fight back and save his friend.

programme.title: She is in Danger
programme.desc: After a fight with her boyfriend, Xue leaves home to stay in a remote B&B accommodation, together with a roommate Yi. One night, Xue accidentally discovers that Yi and another friend have killed Yi's ex-boyfriend, and is locked up by the duo so as to cover up the murder. Xue's buddy, Wen, comes seeking for her - can Xue and Wen escape from danger?

programme.title: Mr. Virgin
programme.desc: Mr. Virgin is a romantic comedy about a twenty-nine year-old man Chao Yu-ting (Alfred Chang) who has seemingly been cursed. He becomes paranoid when a Feng Shui expert tells him it will be unlucky for him to marry before the age of thirty... so comical chaos line the days up to his next birthday!

programme.title: Mr Vampire Saga 4
programme.desc: A Buddhist monk and Taoist priest put aside their differences to take on vampires that have been struck by lightning and have now become a super powered threat to mankind.

programme.title: The Bare-footed Kid
programme.desc: A poor, bare-footed young man from the countryside arrives in the city to work with the friend of his dead father. When their dye shop is burnt down by a local strongman, he decides to fight back to protect all of them and save the shop.

programme.title: Fight Back to School II
programme.desc: Following his demotion, officer Sing resigns from the police force and goes undercover at an international school to privately investigate a terrorist plot. There, he discovers bumbling detective Tat posing as a teacher. Forced into an alliance, they team up to confront the heavily armed criminals behind the plot in a chaotic showdown.

programme.title: Challenge of the Gamesters
programme.desc: A gambling master and his partner are hired by the government to investigate another gambler who may be working as a Japanese spy in Shanghai.

programme.title: Look Out, Officer!
programme.desc: Stephen Chow is a delight in this supernatural action comedy, where a murdered police officer returns from beyond the grave to persuade a rookie cop into avenging his death.

programme.title: Legend Of The Fist- The Return Of Chen Zhen
programme.desc: In 1920s Shanghai, Chen Zhen goes undercover as a businessman to expose a mob boss's collaboration with the Japanese. While gaining his trust, he must also combat a wave of assassins sent by a brutal Japanese general. Fighting from the shadows in a black mask, he allies with a police captain to protect the city's patriots with his formidable fists.

programme.title: Unmatchable Match
programme.desc: Undercover cop Lang is assigned to befriend former triad boss Fei in order to investigate a diamond heist masterminded by the ruthless gangster Big Mad. When the deal goes awry and the diamonds end up in Fei's possession, Big Mad comes after them with a vengeance, forcing Lang and Fei to join forces as an unlikely bond begins to form between them.

programme.title: How to Pick Girls Up !
programme.desc: Xin, a helpless loser in love, calls in to a radio show hosted by DJ Tsang to ask desperately for help. A self-proclaimed love expert, Tsang takes it upon himself to make sure Xin meets girls and leads him on a series of absurd excursions into the wild and dangerous world of modern love.

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: A series of strange events is happening in a peaceful village, including a corpse that is resurrected from its grave and ran away. As the villagers investigate, a villain dies and the village head also goes missing. Police investigation ensues, but as the truths start to unveil, more mysteries are unfolding. Who is the one behind them all?

programme.title: Love Punch
programme.desc: Talented boxer Jia Yang is caught in an underground fight to clear her father's debts. She loses her Olympic aspiration and vanishes from the boxing world. 10 years later, Coach Li Yue is determined to help her honour her father's wish by returning to the ring. As passion and obligation collide, can Jia Yang revive her abandoned boxing dream?

programme.title: Green Wood Robbery
programme.desc: Set in the early years of the Republic of China, the wealthy Kang family is brutally murdered, and their young daughter -the sole witness- mysteriously disappears. For decades, the haunting of the Kang house on Green Wood Lane lingers. As the truth behind the tragedy unfolds, motives of revenge and death intertwine in this chilling mystery.

programme.title: Love on Delivery
programme.desc: A delivery boy Yin wants to impress his dream girl Li, so he enrols in a martial arts course to learn strange moves. Being timid, Yin saves Li while wearing a Garfield mask but the credit is stolen by Karate Master, Liu. To prove himself and win Li back, Yin defeats Liu in the ring with his unique martial arts move "Invincible Wind and Fire Spin".

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: A young girl encounters a novelist in a bar and quickly falls in love with him. However, it turns out she has fallen into a trap set up by the novelist and his ex-girlfriend who is a ghost with a disfigured face. The journey of revenge and ultimate terror has just begun!

programme.title: Young Ip Man: Crisis Time
programme.desc: Set in 1917, young Ip Man pursues his studies in Hong Kong. The school is held hostage on the day of an English speech competition, and as Ip Man decides to step up and fight the crisis, it is revealed that his master and his childhood friend are behind all this. Can he take them down and uphold justice?

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: An epic historic adventure set during the turbulent times of the Three Kingdoms. Cao Cao attempts to enlist Guan Yu into his forces, but Guan is loyal to his sworn brother Liu Bei, who is also Cao's enemy. As Guan tries to rescue Liu Bei's concubine from Cao, he is forced to fight his way through. Can he succeed in the end?

programme.title: Girl with the Diamond Slipper
programme.desc: An aspiring TV actress gets into hot water when a stolen diamond is hidden in the shoes she bought for a party.

programme.title: The Grey Men 2
programme.desc: Triad boss Song seeks to whitewash his image and seize Laika's mayoral seat amid a regime change. He faces a funding shortfall despite colluding with officials, and gets his right-hand man and enforcer to commit crimes to boost his funds and power. Just as Song believes success is imminent, the dynamics between the three take an unexpected turn...

programme.title: Love in a Fallen City
programme.desc: Based on a novel of the same name by the famous novelist Eileen Chang and directed by the equally acclaimed director Ann Hui, this romance story depicts the challenging relationship between an introverted Shanghai divorcee and a cynical Malaysian playboy during the Japanese invasion of Hong Kong in the 1940s. Will the lovers be together in the end?

programme.title: Fist of Legend
programme.desc: When Chen Zhen studies in Japan, he finds several Chinese students missing and accidentally uncovers the Black Dragon Society's conspiracy. A new drug is invented to boost bodies of the Japanese troops in war and the Chinese students are used in their experiments. Chen Zhen vows to take down the evil society and destroy their secret laboratory.

programme.title: Hong Kong Hong Kong
programme.desc: After moving to Hong Kong, illegal immigrant Mang has no choice but to live in cramped quarters with male migrants who abuse her. In order to attain Hong Kong residency and a better life, she agrees to marry a lonely old carpenter. After her marriage, Mang crosses paths again with her ex-lover, and the two develop a passionate affair...

programme.title: Loving You
programme.desc: A bad-tempered, womanizing cop who always neglects his wife is shot in the head as he hunts down a drug dealer. Though he miraculously survives, he must depend on his wife to nurse him back to health. During the recovery, he begins to re-evaluate his life and repair the damages of his broken marriage.

programme.title: Winner Takes All
programme.desc: Two private detectives want to gain fame by solving a series of robberies. However, they were fooled by the King of Thieves during the investigation. It was later discovered that all the robberies were related to a Japanese businessman, Miyamoto. Who is the real King of Thieves?

programme.title: Mr. Funnybone Strikes Again
programme.desc: In this hilarious sequel, Mr Big Potato opens an old-fashioned Chinese clinic, but his traditional methods are rejected by the sceptics of modern Hong Kong. Enter his buddy Mr Funny bone to rescue his business!

programme.title: The New One-Armed Swordsman
programme.desc: David Chiang plays the all-new one-armed hero - a swordsman who chops off his right arm rather than live with dishonour. When the love of his life is kidnapped and his best friend is murdered by the evil gang, it is time to battle.

programme.title: Raw Passions
programme.desc: Mrs Lin's husband and his friend both have affairs with a belly dancer Sasa, and are both blackmailed by her. Sasa is stabbed one day and her brother shows up asking for money. A mysterious man also claims he can offer evidence for cash to help Lin's husband. Lin has to unveil the deceit, double-crosses and blackmailing before she is in danger too!

programme.title: Demon of the Lute
programme.desc: Lute demon Chin Mo has reappeared in the world to wreak havoc. Hsiao Feng Ling is ordered to help find a special bow and arrows that can counter the demon. Only Chiao Yin knows the whereabouts of the weapon. Hsiao and her classmate Old Naughty set out on an arduous journey to find Chiao. After overcoming many obstacles, they catch Chin Mo's man trying to snatch the bow and manage to stop him in time....

programme.title: Rear Entrance
programme.desc: Mrs Xu is childless and watches a lonely little girl playing at the rear entrance from afar every day. She warmly nurtures the girl and even adopts her from her uncaring parent. The girl brings happiness to the Xu's until her long lost mother appears one day and to make her happy, Mrs Xu reluctantly lets the girl reunite with her mother.

programme.title: The Weird Man
programme.desc: During the Three Kingdoms period, a Taoist priest Yu Ji cures many patients with his supernatural powers and is loved by the people. However, the arrogant general Sun Che thinks that Yu Ji bewitches people and orders for him to be beheaded. Subsequently, the spirit of the Yu Ji rises from his dead body and takes revenge on Sun Che.

programme.title: The Crimson Palm
programme.desc: Poor student Lin is engaged to the daughter of a rich man who despises him because of his family's declining status. Lin visits his fiancee before leaving for the Imperial examination, but finds a maid lying dead in blood. As Lin's bloody handprint is left on the site, he is accused of the murder. How can Justice Bao prove his innocence?

programme.title: The Magic Blade
programme.desc: The movie depicts Fu Hong Xue fighting against the formidable conspirator Master Yu and seeing through his deception. The brilliantly choreographed fights, glorious settings, superb cinematography and strong casts define this movie as a highpoint in Wu Xia cinema.

programme.title: Family Light Affair
programme.desc: Alfred Cheung Kin-ting returns to the screen with this seriocomic look at the clash of cultures which result when a Mainland Chinese peasant brings his family to Hong Kong. Family Light Affair, whose Chinese title literally translates as "City Lights", is the director/writer's warm-hearted memoir of street life back in the early 1980s, featuring an eclectic cast of pop music and kung fu stars who shine in their poignant roles.

programme.title: Crippled Avengers
programme.desc: Chu Twin becomes crazy after his son's arms were chopped off. For no reason, he harms four people causing them various disabilities. The four disabled form a band to learn Kung Fu from a master, in order to take revenge on Chu Twin.

programme.title: The Dream of the Red Chamber
programme.desc: Adapted from the most widely read and filmed novel in Chinese history, this version is said to be the most successful one. Betty Loh's looks, demeanour and aura in her portrayal of Lin Dai Yu has won her the epithet "Classic Beauty".

programme.title: The Spiritual Boxer
programme.desc: One of the first kung fu comedies, this is a story about a con artist who uses kung fu to swindle villagers for money by pretending to be possessed by spirits. When they are threatened by bandits, he must use the same skills for good.

programme.title: Diau Charn
programme.desc: In the Han Dynasty, the tyrannical Prime Minister Dong Zuo takes control of the country, so Minister Wang plots to take him down using Diau Charn's beauty. Wang arranges for her to be Dong's concubine as he knows Dong's adopted son Lu Bu is in love with her, turning them against each other. Lu Bu ends up killing Dong Zuo to be with Diau Charn.

programme.title: The Sword of Swords
programme.desc: The Sword Master passes on his sword to his disciple Lin before he dies. However, Lin soon discovers that another disciple Fang also eyes the sword and plots to take it away from Lin, destroying his family and blinding him in the process. Finally, Lin battles Fang for revenge and vows to reclaim his sword.

programme.title: Emperor Chien Lung and the Beauty
programme.desc: Emperor Chien Lung meets a famous courtesan in Suzhou and in order to spend as much time as possible with her, he builds a direct underground tunnel into the Forbidden City. The emperor's sudden appearances through this direct access shock his people but it is also at this time that he helps the needy and cracks the gambling business in Suzhou.

programme.title: Bat Without Wings
programme.desc: The Bat Without Wings, a notorious rapist-murderer, has returned after a five-year absence. A young swordsman and a convoy master investigate the case and suspect that the Bat may be framed. A saying goes that a treasure map is hidden under the Bat's knife, so they try to use that to hunt the real culprit...

programme.title: Crazy Shaolin Disciples
programme.desc: The story revolves around three lay disciples of the Shaolin Temple: Fang Shi Yu, Hong Xi Guan, and Hu Hui Qian. Monk Jie instructs them in martial arts, but their frequent competitions with fellow disciple Wu Qing spark rivalries. The once serene Shaolin Temple is plunged into chaos, yet even the abbot cannot help but be amused by their antics.

programme.title: The Monkey Goes West
programme.desc: Adapted from the classic Chinese novel of the same title, the story follows Monk Tang San Zang's journey to the West in search of the Buddhist Sutra. On the way, he encounters and takes as disciples, Monkey, Pigsy and Sha Wu Jing.

programme.title: The Assassin
programme.desc: Notorious assassin Nieh Cheng has retired into hiding. However, when Premier Yen's family is massacred, he seeks out the reclusive swordsman and coaxes him into a final revenge mission in this epic story set in the Six Kingdom era.

programme.title: Shaolin Intruders
programme.desc: On a routine courier mission, the prestigious Chief was murdered by four mysterious monks. When all evidence pointed to Ching Hua, his friend Lei decides to clear his name by barging in the Shaolin Temple thrice. When Lei thought justice was served for the culprits, he soon realizes the table had turned and the monks stroke again. What follows is a series of intense pursuit for the ultimate villain!

programme.title: Love without End
programme.desc: Singer Qing Qing and architect Peng Nan are a devoted couple. Qing Qing sacrifices herself to help Peng Nan when his family is going through difficulties and is misunderstood by Peng Nan, leading to their break up. When Peng Nan learns the truth and decides to make up with Qing Qing, he finds out that she is suffering from a terminal illness.

programme.title: King Gambler
programme.desc: This film was actually a lively forerunner to the gambling film craze, which eventually swept Asian cinema. Here, it's cardsharp versus cardsharp with a lot more kung-fu action, in a battle of wits and fists to become the king of the casino. The double stings and triple crosses raise in complexity and imagination until what started as an unusual box office risk became a top ten hit of 1976.

programme.title: The Twin Bracelets
programme.desc: Two teenage girls make a pledge to look after each other in a small Chinese fishing town, where the notions of women's rights or sexual freedom are absent. One ends up happily married to a stranger, while the other is cruelly betrothed to the abusive son of a wealthy family and has to seek to free herself from the situation.

programme.title: The Proud Twins
programme.desc: Jiang Xiao Yu is separated from his twin brother as a baby after his parents are murdered. He is taken by a couple to Villains Valley and raised to be a villain by a host of outlaws. Jiang leaves the valley to explore the world when he grows up. Will he be able to avenge his parents and meet with his twin brother?

programme.title: Madam White Snake
programme.desc: Linda Lin Dai is perfect as Pak Su-cheng, the stunning snake goddess who assumes a womanly form so that she can taste the pleasures of a human life! Pak seduces young scholar, Hsu Hsien when she recognises him as her saviour in another life 1,000 years ago. But when Buddhist monk Fa Hai finds out about the union, the pair is forced to split...

programme.title: My Young Auntie
programme.desc: An elderly landowner marries young Dai Nan to keep his inheritance away from his unscrupulous nephew before he dies. When Dai Nan brings along the deed to meet his other nephew, a series of amusing incidents happen with this "young" auntie, the nephew and his son. Kara Hui won Best Actress in the first Hong Kong Film Awards for her role as Dai Nan.

programme.title: Guess Who Killed My Twelve Lovers?
programme.desc: Jenny Hu, Shaw Brothers' gorgeous Chinese-German star, was given her first comedy role in the wild and wacky Guess Who Killed My Twelve Lovers? Described as "a comedy of belly laughs and chilling murders", it is a unique entry in the Hong Kong theater of the absurd.

programme.title: To Kill a Jaguar
programme.desc: Set in 1920s Shanghai, a village girl journeys to the big city in search of her father and meets her childhood friend Jaguar, who works for the mob boss Kam. In a world controlled by the mobs, it is a test of survival for all as Jaguar allies himself with ace gunman Ko Tang, to take over Kam's empire.

programme.title: Genius Go Go Go
programme.desc: Hosted by Sam Tseng and Hsu Nai Lin, this top Taiwan variety show, splits celebrity guests into two teams to battle in various game segments.

programme.title: Perfect Match - EP 73
programme.desc: Perfect Match is a highly-rated large-scale dating variety show that connects eligible bachelors to bachelorettes in China. Be thoroughly entertained by the sharp and witty Meng Fei, one of the top hosts for shows of this genre, as he presents a unique and humorous approach to interactions between all the participants.

programme.title: The Legend of Zhuohua - EP 5
programme.desc: Mu Zhuo Hua (Jing Tian), the illegitimate daughter of the richest man in Jiangnan, is determined to pass the civil service exam. She meets a poorly reputable general named Liu Yan (Feng Shao Feng) and forms an uneasy alliance, which eventually deepens into a closer bond.

programme.title: The Legend of Zhuohua - EP 6
programme.desc: Mu Zhuo Hua (Jing Tian), the illegitimate daughter of the richest man in Jiangnan, is determined to pass the civil service exam. She meets a poorly reputable general named Liu Yan (Feng Shao Feng) and forms an uneasy alliance, which eventually deepens into a closer bond.

programme.title: Genius Go Go Go - EP 275
programme.desc: This large-scale variety show gathers showbiz entertainers to challenge each other in various hilarious educational games. Viewers at home are also encouraged to get in on the fun and try out the games with friends in real life!

programme.title: The Inn 4 - EP 5
programme.desc: Escape to a seaside inn where life slows down and joy takes over. Watch friends run a charming getaway, uncover surprises, and share heartfelt moments in a journey about companionship, healing, and the beauty of living well.

programme.title: Infinity and Beyond 5 - EP 10
programme.desc: Step into a musical journey where singers bridge generations and cultures, reviving classic tunes while championing C-pop globally.

programme.title: Alleys of Flavor, Masters of Life - EP 6
programme.desc: Exploring flavours and food culture through street-food scenes, this documentary captures the raw essence of local ingredients and the everyday cooks behind them, revealing the spirit of regional cuisine and culinary life.

programme.title: Go Where Flavours of Hunan Abound - EP 7
programme.desc: Wang Han, along with Shen Mengchen and Zoelly Wu, explores Hunan's diverse culinary landscape, showcasing 14 cities' unique flavors and soulful local stories.

programme.title: The Midnight Studio - EP 7
programme.desc: The series tells a thrilling story of mean photographer Seo Ki Joo (Joo Won) who runs a photo studio that exists only for the deceased, passionate lawyer Han Boo (Kwon Nara) and the eerie night visitors, who travel between life and death.

programme.title: The Midnight Studio - EP 8
programme.desc: The series tells a thrilling story of mean photographer Seo Ki Joo (Joo Won) who runs a photo studio that exists only for the deceased, passionate lawyer Han Boo (Kwon Nara) and the eerie night visitors, who travel between life and death.

programme.title: The 44th Hong Kong Film Awards Red Carpet
programme.desc: The 44th Hong Kong Film Awards, the most anticipated event in Chinese cinema! Stars unite to celebrate excellence both on screen and behind the scenes. Witness who will take home the ultimate glory!

programme.title: The 44th Hong Kong Film Awards Ceremony
programme.desc: The 44th Hong Kong Film Awards, the most anticipated event in Chinese cinema! Stars unite to celebrate excellence both on screen and behind the scenes. Witness who will take home the ultimate glory!

programme.desc: Exploring flavours and food culture through street-food scenes, this documentary captures the raw essence of local ingredients and the everyday cooks behind them, revealing the spirit of regional cuisine and culinary life.

programme.title: Hot Door Night - EP 156
programme.desc: Catch all the fun and laughter right here as we bring you Taiwan's top-grossing variety entertainment show that will keep you wanting for more!

programme.title: Only For Love - EP 6
programme.desc: Hardworking financial reporter Zheng Shu Yi (Bai Lu) is determined to land a front-page story with Shi Yan (Dylan Wang) a successful young CEO that the whole city is talking about. She pulls all the stops, eventually gets through to him and even love blossoms.

programme.title: The Wesley's Mysterious File
programme.desc: Wesley, a special agent investigating extra-terrestrial sightings, hot on the trails of a female alien looking for her brother. He and his partner uncover a government conspiracy involving human experiments with two different alien species.

programme.title: Genius Go Go Go - EP 275
programme.desc: This large-scale variety show gathers showbiz entertainers to challenge each other in various hilarious educational games. Viewers at home are also encouraged to get in on the fun and try out the games with friends in real life!

programme.title: James' Going Places - EP 82
programme.desc: Join James, the host with outstanding culinary skills and an appetite for good food, as he explores markets and savours local delicacies in Taiwan!

programme.title: Only For Love - EP 7
programme.desc: Hardworking financial reporter Zheng Shu Yi (Bai Lu) is determined to land a front-page story with Shi Yan (Dylan Wang) a successful young CEO that the whole city is talking about. She pulls all the stops, eventually gets through to him and even love blossoms.

programme.title: Perfect Match 12 - EP 43
programme.desc: Perfect Match is a highly-rated large-scale dating variety show that connects eligible bachelors to bachelorettes in China. Be thoroughly entertained by the sharp and witty Meng Fei, one of the top hosts for shows of this genre, as he presents a unique and humorous approach to interactions between all the participants.

programme.title: Billionaire Story - EP 431
programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: Storm City
programme.desc: The "Risk Control" system, developed by researcher Zhang Zicong and his team, inadvertently triggered a series of natural disasters, leading to the city's collapse. Amidst chaos, father Zhang Yingyong strives to safeguard his children, Zhang Zicong and Zhang Ziran. Despite devastation caused by an unexpected typhoon, love paves the way for renewal.

programme.title: Destined - EP 36
programme.desc: Lin Yu Ru, the daughter of a cloth merchant who's suffered childhood hardships and she is married to Gu Jiu Si who is the notorious son of Yangzhou's wealthiest family, infamous for his indolent ways. They grow closer despite their differences.

programme.title: The Line Watchers - EP 17
programme.desc: The drama follows IP Investigation Bureau Senior Superintendent (Benjamin Yuen), Trade Controls Officer (Mandy Wong), Customs Drug Investigation Bureau Superintendent (Venus Wong) get to the bottom of bombs, drugs and more at Hong Kong customs.
